nodes.name: Quantum Computing
nodes.description: Quantum Computing leverages quantum mechanical phenomena to perform computations.

nodes.name: Quantum Bits
nodes.description: Quantum Bits (qubits) can exist in multiple states simultaneously.

nodes.name: IBM
nodes.description: IBM is a company investing in quantum hardware and quantum error correction research.

nodes.name: Google
nodes.description: Google is a company investing in quantum hardware and quantum error correction research.

nodes.name: Microsoft
nodes.description: Microsoft is a company investing in quantum hardware and quantum error correction research.

nodes.name: Superposition
nodes.description: Superposition is a quantum mechanical phenomenon utilized in quantum computing.

nodes.name: Entanglement
nodes.description: Entanglement is a quantum mechanical phenomenon utilized in quantum computing.

fbff5ad35093e7c5cc5e947feb7d62db0cd9b09b.user_input_preview: Artificial intelligence (AI) is the intelligence of machines or software, as opposed to the intelligence of living being

nodes.name: Artificial Intelligence
nodes.description: Artificial intelligence (AI) is the intelligence of machines or software, as opposed to the intelligence of living beings, primarily of humans.

nodes.name: Computer Science
nodes.description: Computer science is a field of research that develops and studies methods and software for enabling machines to perceive their environment.

nodes.name: Google Search
nodes.description: Google Search is an advanced web search engine that is a high-profile application of AI.

nodes.name: YouTube
nodes.description: YouTube is a platform that uses recommendation systems as a high-profile application of AI.

nodes.name: Amazon
nodes.description: Amazon is a platform that uses recommendation systems as a high-profile application of AI.

nodes.name: Netflix
nodes.description: Netflix is a platform that uses recommendation systems as a high-profile application of AI.

nodes.name: Google Assistant
nodes.description: Google Assistant is an AI that interacts via human speech.

nodes.name: Siri
nodes.description: Siri is an AI that interacts via human speech.

nodes.name: Alexa
nodes.description: Alexa is an AI that interacts via human speech.

nodes.name: Waymo
nodes.description: Waymo is an autonomous vehicle company that is a high-profile application of AI.

nodes.name: ChatGPT
nodes.description: ChatGPT is a generative AI tool developed by OpenAI.

nodes.name: AI Art
nodes.description: AI Art is a generative and creative tool that is a high-profile application of AI.

nodes.name: Chess
nodes.description: Chess is a strategy game where AI demonstrates superhuman play and analysis.

nodes.name: Go
nodes.description: Go is a strategy game where AI demonstrates superhuman play and analysis.

nodes.name: Large Language Models
nodes.description: Large language models (LLMs) are a type of AI trained on enormous amounts of text data.

nodes.name: GPT-4
nodes.description: GPT-4 is a capable large language model developed by OpenAI.

nodes.name: PaLM
nodes.description: PaLM is a large language model developed by Google that demonstrates strong reasoning and multilingual capabilities.

nodes.name: LLaMA
nodes.description: LLaMA is an open-weights large language model released by Meta.

nodes.name: Claude
nodes.description: Claude is a large language model developed by Anthropic that emphasizes safety and helpfulness.

nodes.name: Transformer Architecture
nodes.description: Transformer architectures with self-attention mechanisms are used by large language models to learn relationships between tokens in text.

nodes.name: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback
nodes.description: Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) is used to align model behavior with human preferences.

nodes.name: Natural Language Processing
nodes.description: Natural language processing is a field where AI models perform tasks like question answering and summarization.

nodes.name: Computer Vision
nodes.description: Computer vision is a field where deep learning models achieve superhuman accuracy on image classification benchmarks.

nodes.name: Multimodal Models
nodes.description: Multimodal models process both text and images and are becoming increasingly powerful.

nodes.name: AI Safety and Alignment Research
nodes.description: AI safety and alignment research focuses on ensuring that AI systems behave as intended and do not cause unintended harm.

nodes.name: Anthropic
nodes.description: Anthropic is an organization working on AI safety and alignment research.

nodes.name: DeepMind
nodes.description: DeepMind is an organization working on AI safety and alignment research.

nodes.name: OpenAI
nodes.description: OpenAI is an organization working on AI safety and alignment research.

nodes.name: Economic Impact of AI
nodes.description: The economic impact of AI includes job displacement and the creation of new work categories.

nodes.name: Scientific Discovery
nodes.description: AI-powered tools are accelerating scientific discovery in various domains.

nodes.name: AI Regulations
nodes.description: Policymakers are developing regulations to govern AI deployment.
